prerequisites.value: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Disarm, base attack bonus +1.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you succeed at a combat maneuver check to disarm an opponent, you can attempt a second disarm at a â5 penalty against an opponent adjacent to the original target.
